title: Ban bat
description: Do you hate these annoying little pests? This mod/datapack can make them disappear!
body:
# **Ban bat**

**Bats are among the most pointless mobs in Minecraft—no drops, no purpose, just noisy cave clutter everywhere! Sick of their squeaks and random spawns? This lightweight mod/datapack completely disables bat spawning in your world. No more flapping distractions—ever. Works on all versions with zero performance impact. Clean caves, peaceful mining!**

(Using a translator, the meaning may not be accurate.)
